tags.name: Missing assumption
tags.description: Key problem assumption or setup condition is omitted.

tags.name: Equation misapplied
tags.description: Correct formula selected but applied incorrectly.

tags.name: Algebraic error
tags.description: Manipulation or simplification mistake in symbolic steps.

tags.name: Units error
tags.description: Incorrect or missing units and dimensional mismatch.

tags.name: Sign error
tags.description: Incorrect sign convention or sign handling.

tags.name: Diagram misread
tags.description: Figure or diagram details interpreted incorrectly.

tags.name: Logic gap
tags.description: Major reasoning step missing between claims.

tags.name: Incomplete solution
tags.description: Solution starts correctly but is unfinished.

tags.name: Final answer incorrect
tags.description: Final submitted answer is incorrect despite prior work.
